# Soft37 Async26 Tool25k Contract

## Soft 37
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.37 with quality bias floor 0.35 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 26
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.26 so reclaim starts earlier

## Tool 2.5k
tool result budgets default to 2500 chars with 40-char previews for denser reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status vitest
